request: Fix CI ERELEASEBRANCHES error introduced by commit 0682a28: revert .releaserc.json branches[0] from { name: 'main', range: '0.x' } to 'main' string. The range modifier in semantic-release marks a branch as a maintenance branch for an older major line, not a version cap; with no other branch carrying current dev work, semantic-release filters main out and aborts. Keep the { breaking: true, release: 'minor' } releaseRule which alone provides the alpha-period guarantee against accidental major bumps.
